mapper.sql: aggregate_type, aggregate_id, status, current_revision_id, current_slug, version, published_at
id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, version, snapshot_schema_version, snapshot::text as json, checksum, published_by, published_at
mapper.insert: insert into portfolio.publication(aggregate_type, aggregate_id, status, version) values ('PROJECT', #{projectId}, 'ARCHIVED', 0) on conflict (aggregate_type, aggregate_id) do nothing
mapper.select: select from portfolio.publication where aggregate_type = #{type} and aggregate_id = #{aggregateId} for update

select publication.aggregate_type, publication.aggregate_id, publication.status, publication.current_revision_id, publication.current_slug, publication.version, publication.published_at from portfolio.publication publication join portfolio.project project_workspace on project_workspace.id = publication.aggregate_id where publication.aggregate_type = 'PROJECT' and publication.status = 'PUBLISHED' order by project_workspace.sort_order, project_workspace.id

select current_publication.current_slug from portfolio.slug_redirect redirect join portfolio.publication current_publication on current_publication.aggregate_type = 'PROJECT' and current_publication.aggregate_id = redirect.project_id and current_publication.status = 'PUBLISHED' and current_publication.current_revision_id is not null and current_publication.current_slug is not null where redirect.old_slug = #{oldSlug}
mapper.insert: insert into portfolio.content_revision( id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, version, snapshot_schema_version, snapshot, checksum, published_by, published_at) values ( #{revision.id}, #{revision.type}, #{revision.aggregateId}, #{revision.version}, #{revision.schemaVersion}, #{revision.json}::jsonb, #{revision.checksum}, #{revision.publishedBy}, #{revision.publishedAt})

insert into portfolio.revision_media_reference( revision_id, asset_id, variant_name, usage) values
(#{revisionId}, #{reference.assetId}, #{reference.variantName}, #{reference.usage})
insert into portfolio.slug_redirect(old_slug, new_slug, project_id, created_at) values (#{oldSlug}, #{newSlug}, #{projectId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: select from portfolio.content_revision where aggregate_type=#{type} and aggregate_id=#{aggregateId} order by version desc
